title: Software Engineer (New Grad or Intern)
mainText:

Software Engineer (New Grad or Intern)
Posted 1 month ago∙Apply by April 14, 2026 at 8:59 PM
Save

Apply
At a glance
$20–50/hr
Remote or hybrid, based in Jersey City, NJ, or New York, NY
Work from home, or in person part of the week from one of the locations
Job
Full-time
US work authorization required
Open to candidates with OPT/CPT
Job description

Join Ra Labs: Shape the Future of AI

Are you a driven computer science student or recent graduate eager to gain hands-on experience in a fast-paced startup environment? Do you want to work on innovative AI projects that could redefine how businesses operate? If so, Ra Labs has an exciting opportunity for you—whether you're looking for an internship or your first engineering role.

At Ra Labs, we're building more than just technology—we're shaping the future. Our team of dedicated engineers is creating AI solutions to drive efficiency and scalability for businesses worldwide. Check out our app at thelegionai.com. Beyond our technical mission, we're passionate about empowering the next generation of entrepreneurs, helping turn bold ideas into thriving startups.

Your Role at Ra Labs

As a software engineering intern or junior engineer, you'll be a key part of our team, working on impactful projects from day one. You'll:

Contribute to the development of backend systems powering our AI applications.
Build and deploy cloud-based solutions that address real-world challenges.
Ship new features and see your code make an immediate difference.
Collaborate with experienced engineers who will mentor you and accelerate your growth.
Gain exposure to the startup ecosystem, with potential opportunities to learn about pitching to top accelerators like Y Combinator and Techstars.

This isn't just a job—it's a chance to join a startup at the ground level. As an early team member, you'll receive equity, giving you a stake in our success and the potential for limitless upside as we scale.

What We're Looking For

Are pursuing or have recently completed a degree in Computer Science or a related field.
Thrive in a remote work environment with strong self-motivation and time management skills.
Communicate clearly and collaborate effectively with a team.
Tackle complex problems with creativity, persistence, and a solutions-oriented mindset.
Are eager to learn, adapt, and grow in a dynamic startup setting.

While not required, the following will make you stand out:

Previous internship experience or relevant project work (for interns).
1-2 years of professional experience or equivalent (for junior engineers).
Familiarity with remote work tools and practices.
Proficiency in Python, JavaScript, or AI/ML technologies.
A passion for innovation and emerging tech trends.

Why Join Ra Labs?

This opportunity offers a rare combination of immediate impact and long-term potential. Here's what you'll gain:

Equity and Ownership: Receive equity as part of your compensation, offering a unique chance to share in the company's growth.
Hands-On Experience: Work on projects that directly contribute to our mission and see your code in action.
Mentorship and Learning: Gain insights from seasoned engineers and exposure to the startup world.
Startup Energy: Immerse yourself in an agile, innovative environment where your contributions shape our future.
Remote Flexibility: Enjoy a remote work setup that prioritizes productivity and work-life balance.

Our team is built on collaboration, innovation, and a commitment to continuous learning. We value diverse perspectives and foster an inclusive environment where ideas thrive.

Ready to Shape the Future?

If you're excited to jump into the world of startups and make a real impact, we'd love to hear from you. Please send your resume, a brief note about why this opportunity excites you, and a link to your GitHub or portfolio (if applicable).

 

At Ra Labs, we're dedicated to building a brighter future through technology. Bring your passion for innovation and a willingness to learn—no magic wands required. Apply now and let's create something extraordinary together!
